arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-04-17T18:07:00+08:00
sprint: 9
week: 2
date_range: April 14-18, 2026
---

# Sprint 9 Week 2 Retrospective

## Overview

Week 2 of Sprint 9 focused on backend API development, performance optimization, and integration testing for Project Orion v2.5.

## What Went Well

- **API Development**: Successfully completed 85% of v2.5 API endpoints ahead of schedule
- **Team Collaboration**: Daily standups were productive with quick blocker resolution
- **Code Quality**: All PRs passed review with minimal rework required
- **Documentation**: API documentation was updated concurrently with development
- **Testing Coverage**: Unit test coverage increased from 78% to 84%

## What Could Be Improved

- **Estimation Accuracy**: Several tasks took 20-30% longer than estimated due to edge cases
- **Cross-team Communication**: Frontend team reported delays waiting for API contract finalization
- **Technical Debt**: Some legacy code refactoring was deferred to meet sprint goals
- **Testing Environment**: Staging environment had intermittent availability issues on Thursday

## Action Items for Next Sprint

| Action Item | Owner | Due Date | Priority |
|-------------|-------|----------|----------|
| Revise estimation process to include buffer for edge cases | Alex Zhang | 2026-04-21 | High |
| Implement API contract pre-review with frontend team | Alex Zhang | 2026-04-22 | High |
| Schedule dedicated technical debt sprint session | Alex Zhang | 2026-04-25 | Medium |
| Coordinate with DevOps to improve staging reliability | Bai | 2026-04-23 | High |
| Create API versioning strategy document | Bai | 2026-04-24 | Medium |

## Metrics

- **Velocity**: 42 story points completed (target: 38)
- **Bug Count**: 3 new bugs introduced, 12 bugs resolved
- **Code Review Turnaround**: Average 4.2 hours
- **Deployment Frequency**: 2 deployments to staging

## Notes

- Team morale remains high despite tight deadlines
- Consider rotating pair programming partners next week for knowledge sharing
- Dana suggested implementing automated regression tests for critical paths
